data.title: DDoS Protection
data.technical_spec: Advanced algorithms and server redundancy are used to mitigate attacks.

data.title: Security Patching
data.description: Regular updates are applied to protect against vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Automated patch management with immediate response to CVE alerts.

data.title: End-to-End Encryption
data.technical_spec: Uses TLS for data encryption to ensure privacy and integrity.

data.title: Intrusion Detection System (IDS)
data.description: Monitors the network for suspicious activities.
data.technical_spec: Uses machine learning algorithms to detect and respond to anomalies.

data.title: Two-Factor Authentication
data.description: Adds an extra layer of security to user accounts.
data.technical_spec: Supports various 2FA options including SMS and authenticator apps.
